taskTemplate.name: Underwrite
taskTemplate.description: Underwriter reviews submitted loan file and renders approval, denial, or counteroffer decision

subTaskTemplate.name: Approve
subTaskTemplate.description: Approve – Loan approved by underwriter; this subtask is auto-completed when the underwriter approves the loan in the system

subTaskTemplate.name: Deny
subTaskTemplate.description: Deny – Loan denied by underwriter; marking Done triggers the denial task flow

subTaskTemplate.name: CounterOffer
subTaskTemplate.description: CounterOffer – Underwriter issues a counteroffer; marking Done triggers the counteroffer task flow

subTaskTemplate.name: Return to Processor
subTaskTemplate.description: Return to Processor – File is not ready for underwriting decision; marking Done sends the file back to the processor for additional documentation or corrections
